eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Lincoln, CO; at 02:38 PM ON FEB 17, 2026 Effective until 04:38 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Lincoln Co Sheriff. Wildfire evacuation NOW. County Road 2T to County Road 22. North to 2W. Available shelter at 130 C Avenue in Limon.
